para_trans: The travel allowance for the period of assumption of office and transfer is admissible as per the prevailing rules of the Government.
will remain.
The said officer has been transferred by the Director, Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Mumbai.
They should be released immediately. The transferred officer should appear immediately at the post of transferor.
The directorate should immediately submit a report to the government in this regard.
(4) No leave shall be granted to the said officer for any reason except with the previous sanction of the Government.
Also transferred by original office as per Rule-30 (c) of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Leave) Rules, 1981.
No leave applications of officers should be accepted. If such an application is received, it shall be made to the said officer.
Payments must be returned by post to the original address.
5. if the said officer does not appear for immediate transfer in accordance with the said transfer order, or
If any kind of pressure is exerted to cancel the transfer, this action is taken by the Maharashtra Civil Service (Conduct).
It is against them as misconduct as it violates Rule 23 of the Rules, 1979.
Disciplinary action will be taken.
The Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
